conversations.content: Please transfer my emmajohnson/image_transformation repository to bobolive.

<function_thought>

</function_thought>

<final_answer></final_answer>

<function_thought>
I have retrieved the logged-in user's information, which includes the username 'emmajohnson'. The target repository for transfer is 'emmajohnson/image_transformation' to the new owner 'bobolive'. Now, I can proceed to execute the `git_transfer_repo_ownership` function to transfer the repository.
</function_thought>

<function_call>[git_transfer_repo_ownership(repo_name="emmajohnson/image_transformation", new_owner_username="bobolive", new_owner_email=None)]</function_call>

<final_answer></final_answer>
Verification required. An email with an OTP has been sent to your inbox to confirm the transfer.

</function_thought>
